name: Angelica — Cut It Out You Dope
description:
"You know... yeah. Reasonable crashout."

Angelica from Library of Ruina is a Fixer of Charles' Office and the original Black Silence. This is during the encounter with the Blood-red Night, more precisely after Elena retreated. POV of Roland.
